TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pacavalj, title = Pacavalj, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pacavalj} }

S.FORM: alang Pacavalj ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 467 buwan, 1,217 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 1,180 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 37 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 3%, Puyuma 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Pacavalj hya' ga Seqeciin. tay mkyahu' na Pacavalj hya' ga Ku shushu . rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pacavalj ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 467 buwan, 1,217 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 1,180 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 37 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 3%, Puyuma 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Pacavalj hya' ga Seqeciin. tay mkyahu' na Pacavalj hya' ga Ku shushu . rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ paʦ~ʨa*alj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pujuma *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na paʦ~ʨa*alj ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin. taj mkjaħuʔ na paʦ~ʨa*alj ħjaʔ ɣa ku s~ɕħus~ɕħu . rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
